explanation:

Discount Percent: Listed as 5% in master_contract.pdf (4) and pricing.xlsx Base Pricing (3). amendment_q2.docx Table (2) shows 10%, which is also recorded in pricing.xlsx Discounts & Amendments (3) as an Amendment Override effective 2026-01-01. The amendment (precedence 2) overrides the earlier 5%, so 10% wins.
Tax Percent: Specified as 8% in master_contract.pdf (4) and reiterated in pricing.xlsx Base Pricing (3). No higher-precedence source changes tax, so the highest-precedence value available is 8% from the Excel sheet (precedence 3).
Effective Date: amendment_q2.docx states the revised pricing is effective 2026-01-01; the Discounts & Amendments sheet shows the same effective date for the 10% discount override. Therefore, 2026-01-01 is the effective date for the current terms.
Overall, amendment_q2.docx (precedence 2) is the most authoritative source affecting CP-001, so it is listed as the controlling document.
